summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink bug fixes completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Landing page featured listings carousel with alternating products/rentals/services, Guest Marketplace with add-to-cart and guest checkout, Social Feed with file upload buttons and post sharing. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/upload/file - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/upload/file - Successfully uploads image files
Backend: POST /api/upload/file - Rejects unsupported file types (400)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts - Create post with image (+20 BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/share - Share post (+10 BL coins)
Backend: POST /api/social/posts/{id}/share - Cannot share private posts (403)
Backend: GET /api/referral-system/my-network - Returns referral network data
Backend: GET /api/referral-system/stats - Returns referral stats
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/listings - Accessible without auth
Backend: GET /api/rentals/properties - Accessible without auth
Backend: GET /api/services - Accessible without auth
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/guest-checkout - Processes guest orders
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/guest-checkout - Validates required fields
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/guest-checkout - Handles multiple items
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/listings?limit=6 - Works for carousel
Backend: GET /api/rentals/properties?limit=6 - Works for carousel
Backend: GET /api/services?limit=6 - Works for carousel
Frontend: Landing page loads with featured listings carousel
Frontend: Carousel shows alternating Products/Rentals/Services
Frontend: Category filter buttons (All, Products, Rentals, Services) work
Frontend: 'Browse All as Guest' button navigates to /marketplace/guest
Frontend: Guest Marketplace page loads with 12 items
Frontend: Search input and category filters work
Frontend: Add to cart functionality works with toast notification
Frontend: Cart dialog opens with item count
Frontend: Guest Checkout dialog opens with form fields
Frontend: Guest checkout places order successfully
Frontend: Social Feed page loads with posts
Frontend: Create Post dialog has file upload buttons (Image, Video, Audio)
Frontend: Post creation works with BL coin rewards
Frontend: Post sharing works with +10 BL coins reward
Frontend: Like, Comment, Share buttons visible on posts
Frontend: AI Create FAB button visible
critical_code_review_comments: File upload endpoint /api/upload/file correctly requires authentication and validates file types
Post creation with media uploads works correctly with BL coin rewards (image=20, video=50, audio=30)
Post sharing endpoint correctly awards 10 BL coins and prevents sharing private posts
Referral network endpoint returns complete data including referral_code, level counts, and commissions
Guest marketplace correctly displays products, rentals, and services without authentication
Guest checkout processes orders and validates required fields (name, email, address)
Landing page carousel correctly alternates between products, rentals, and services
MOCKED: Guest checkout Stripe payment falls back to order placement without payment if Stripe not configured
seed_data_creation: Created test posts with images, shared posts, and guest orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes testing completed. All requested features verified: File upload endpoint works with authentication, post creation with media uploads awards correct BL coins, post sharing works with +10 BL coins, referral network endpoint returns complete data, guest marketplace displays all item types, guest checkout processes orders without login, landing page carousel shows alternating products/rentals/services. Guest checkout Stripe payment is MOCKED - falls back to order placement without payment.
